title: Parameterized Access, Authorization, Privacy, and Audit · Result-Grain Case: Parameterized Queries
summary: A web service accepts user filters, exposes support data by role, and must resist injection and excessive collection. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sql parameterized queries increment in a least-privilege parameterized data-access contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bind untrusted values through prepared statements while allow-listing unavoidable identifiers or directions.
Identify code-data boundary failures in dynamic SQL and demonstrate why escaping alone is incomplete.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.

-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A viewer submits severity text "high' OR 1=1 --" and sort direction "desc" while requesting member details. content.code:
-- Application contract: prepare once and bind :severity as data.
SELECT ticket_id, title, status
FROM tickets
WHERE severity = 'high'
ORDER BY opened_at, ticket_id;
-- Structural choices such as sort direction require an application allow-list.

FROM tickets;
SELECT * FROM public_queue_13t6xu ORDER BY ticket_id;
